user_outcome: An operator's sworn maintainability review constructs one exact candidate path set, exclusion record, mode-and-object manifest, fingerprint, and normalized prompt diff, with stale or unrecognized provenance failing closed before report authority.
rationale: This slice owns C-04 and turns S06's raw committed objects into Baton's sole semantic identity. It reads no network or credentials, never logs source/blob payloads outside the explicitly returned normalized diff, and fails before construction when dirty or untracked work exists rather than reading those bytes. Output is deterministic machine data with no UI accessibility concern. Enumeration, classification, manifest construction, and sorting are O(commits plus changed paths plus included bytes), with bytewise sort O(n log n); no quadratic path comparisons are permitted.
in_scope: Require git status --porcelain=v1 -z --untracked-files=all to emit zero bytes; accept immutable full commit IDs for start/base and requested review head plus release, slice, and physical status path as semantic identity; accept current track/release-wt refs and heads only as a separately moving freshness frontier and verify all required first-parent relationships.

Derive authored candidates from reverse first-parent non-merge commits in base..head using NUL-delimited no-rename path changes; separately derive merge contributions, reject authored/merge overlap, and exclude a merge only after exact two-parent release-wt synchronization provenance succeeds, invoking C-07 canonical composition for every both-parents-changed declared shared path before recognizing that synchronization.

While protocol authority is planning only, recognize a historical bootstrap reconciliation solely when the sealed v2 schema and manifest have no duplicate keys, both exact digests reproduce, the requested live_review or non-dispatch historical_report envelope exactly matches consumer, immutable start, requested review head, start-exclusive/head-inclusive interval and permitted purpose, and the exact ordered release/merge/parent/base/eight-path tuples validate. The manifest substitutes only its complete exceptional release-record mismatch set. Apply ordinary section-6 topology, structural ancestry, non-record/shared, unlisted release-record and deterministic index provenance to the same merge, except that 7696c9bf alone may traverse its independently replayed actual 998b44c0 versus expected 9bf11cda noncanonical projection under an exact S02 envelope; the stale index never becomes current authority. For the sole S02 manual-adapter replacement, also require the exact claim- and receipt-schema digests and absence of a prior claim before returning semantic scope; scope construction itself never authorizes dispatch, and an existing claim is consumed-budget evidence rather than permission to recompute or redispatch. Reject wrong-kind, wrong-slice, outside-endpoint, pre-start, future, recomputed, pattern-matched, caller-supplied, orphan-derived, claimed-but-unreported, or second-replacement authority.

Reject unrecognized synchronization, ambiguous merge-base, custom merge trees, post-pin authored semantic changes, invalid UTF-8 paths, and post-pin merge contributions overlapping the reviewed candidate set; record each recognized merge-only path once in excluded_paths.

Exclude only net-zero paths, the physical release record/evidence tree, head-tree paths explicitly marked baton-generated or linguist-generated as set/true, and the exact Baton lockfile basename list; undeclared generated output remains included.
Sort included and excluded paths by unsigned UTF-8 bytes and emit every exclusion once; diagnostic reason codes may exist internally but are non-authoritative and absent from exact Baton identity.

Build C-04's byte-exact upstream baton-maintainability-v1 manifest from only its header plus sorted path length/bytes and base/head mode plus full object IDs or absence, derive lowercase sha256 input_fingerprint from those exact bytes, carry release/slice/status/start/base/head as immutable semantic identity, and carry track/release-wt heads plus recognized synchronization tuples only in the separately revalidated freshness frontier.

Generate the prompt diff only over included literal paths with the isolated bare-object-store environment and complete argv specified in planning/normative-clarifications.md section 5; invalid UTF-8 or non-zero Git output fails closed and an empty included set returns the exact empty manifest identity and deterministic zero diff bytes without invoking Git.

Extend the real sworn maintainability review command to construct C-04 after C-07 synchronization validation; once exact scope exists it exits non-zero with redacted reason ledger_authority_unavailable until S08 lands and performs zero model dispatch or report mutation.
out_of_scope: Model dispatch, full-report persistence, reuse, and status-ledger identity belong to S08 and S13.
Lifecycle phase, role, cycle, budget, and Coach transition validation belongs to S09-lifecycle-fsm-adjudication.

C-07 composition is consumed here for synchronization recognition; installing a composed blob belongs to S15, while track-wide active/retired intervals, freshness, rollback equality, and integration readiness belong to S11 and S12.
This package must not read working-tree content as semantic authority, guess generated files, use broad ignore patterns, or expose adapter-specific scope variants.

effort_complexity.rationale: The algorithm binds first-parent provenance, exact exclusions, binary object identity, deterministic diff presentation, and stale-head rejection across thirteen focused files.

risks.description: A merge-only contribution is excluded without proving it is a canonical release-wt synchronization, hiding authored product bytes from review.
risks.mitigation: Require the exact two-parent, second-parent reachability, unique merge-base, canonical tree, and release-branch structural provenance tests before classifying any merge contribution as excluded.

risks.description: Generated or lockfile heuristics become broad local ignore rules and omit semantic changes.
risks.mitigation: Implement only the exact attribute values and basename allowlist in C-04, record every excluded path once, and mutation-test near-miss names and unset/false attributes as included.

risks.description: Ambient Git diff configuration changes prompt bytes without changing the fingerprint, allowing unsafe report reuse.
risks.mitigation: Pin every diff flag and locale, compare under hostile config/attributes/drivers, and require the committed manifest identity plus normalized diff fixture to remain invariant.

risks.description: The sealed historical reconciliation authority becomes a generic waiver for custom merges, stale index projections, orphan reports, or repeated closure dispatch.
risks.mitigation: Require exact v2 schema, claim-schema, receipt-schema and manifest digests, ordered entries, envelope kind/consumer/start/head/interval/purpose, full OIDs, eight-path equality, exact 7696 actual/expected render replay, permanent orphan denial flags, and one hold-bound manual replacement whose claim commit consumes its dispatch slot and issues a non-resumable permit; ordinary checks remain mandatory everywhere else and C-13 retires all recognition.

acceptance_criteria.text: WHEN TestCanonicalScopeRealGitRepository constructs clean real histories with authored commits, C-07-valid recognized sync merges including a both-parents-changed declared shared path, generated attributes, lockfiles, binary changes, modes, submodules, and adversarial paths THE SYSTEM SHALL emit exactly C-04's included paths, each excluded path once, immutable semantic identity, freshness frontier, manifest, fingerprint, and normalized diff (C-07, N-03, N-06, N-07, N-08, N-10).

WHEN separately clean repositories have the same committed immutable semantic identity but different locale, Git config, info attributes, external drivers, textconv, rename settings, or later moving track/release-wt heads that pass frontier revalidation THE SYSTEM SHALL emit identical C-04 manifest identity and prompt diff; WHEN either worktree/index is dirty or untracked THE SYSTEM SHALL fail before emitting either.

WHEN any included path's committed bytes, mode, full object identity, net presence, release, slice, status, start, base, or requested review head changes THE SYSTEM SHALL change the exact immutable C-04 identity or reject construction; WHEN only current track/release-wt heads advance through release-record-only or recognized disjoint synchronizations THE SYSTEM SHALL revalidate the freshness frontier without changing reusable semantic identity; release-record, explicitly generated, exact lockfile-only, and net-zero paths SHALL remain recorded exclusions and not consume prompt scope.

IF commits, first-parent ancestry, synchronization provenance, C-07 shared composition, merge tree, UTF-8, cleanliness, pinned head, post-pin changes, authored-versus-merge ownership, normalized diff output, or a consumed sealed v2 authority's schema/claim-schema/receipt-schema/manifest digest, duplicate-key check, planning authority, ordered entry, envelope kind, consumer, immutable start, exact requested review head, interval membership, purpose, merge/parent/base identity, eight-path declaration, B/P1/P2/result tuple, 7696 actual/expected render replay, historical-report binding, orphan denial, hold correction, claim/receipt contract, or replacement budget is ambiguous or invalid—or any other merge fails an ordinary section-6 topology, structural ancestry, non-record/shared, unlisted release-record, or deterministic index-render check, or any unlisted, wrong-slice, outside-endpoint, pre-start, future, recomputed, pattern-matched, caller-supplied, orphan-reused, claimed-but-unreported, or second replacement is requested—THEN THE SYSTEM SHALL fail scope construction with no partial scope, report, lifecycle authority, or model dispatch.

WHEN every candidate path is an exact release record, generated output, listed lockfile, or net-zero change THE SYSTEM SHALL emit the exact header-only C-04 manifest and fingerprint plus zero prompt-diff bytes without invoking Git, leaving the review operation to persist Baton's deterministic zero-dispatch PASS report (N-03, N-10).

WHEN the built sworn binary runs maintainability review against a clean temporary history with authored, excluded, and recognized synchronization paths THE SYSTEM SHALL reach C-04 through the public command, construct the exact manifest/fingerprint/diff, then exit non-zero with redacted reason ledger_authority_unavailable and zero model dispatch or report mutation; any C-04 provenance or scope failure SHALL stop at that earlier gate (C-04, C-07, N-03, N-06, N-07, N-08, N-10).

WHEN an exact v2-authorized S01 live_review or S02 live_review/historical_report envelope is requested under planning authority by its exact consumer, immutable start, exact review head, start-exclusive/head-inclusive interval and permitted purpose, its ordered merge and eight release-record tuples pass, every ordinary section-6 topology, structural, non-record/shared and unlisted-record check passes, and 7696 either is absent or independently replays committed index blob 998b44c0 and expected noncanonical blob 9bf11cda under its sealed ref snapshot THE SYSTEM SHALL recognize exactly the listed release-record exceptions while treating the stale index as non-authoritative; historical_report SHALL revalidate only its exact committed preflight with zero dispatch, and any other consumer/head/purpose/index mismatch SHALL fail before scope or dispatch.
